name: Gemini Image Generator MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Google Gemini AI image generation capabilities. Enables AI agents to generate images using Google's Gemini/Imagen models via the Gemini API — producing images from text prompts, supporting creative workflows, content generation, and multimodal AI applications.
use_cases: Generating images from text descriptions using Google Gemini from creative agents
Producing visual content for marketing and content creation from automation agents
Creating illustrative images for documents and reports from productivity agents
Integrating Gemini image generation into multimodal AI workflows
not_for: Teams using other image generation services (DALL-E, Midjourney, Stability AI)
Production image generation at scale without quota planning
Photorealistic product images requiring fine-tuned models
best_when: A team using Google's AI ecosystem wants AI agents to generate images via Gemini — particularly for teams already using Gemini API for other AI tasks.
avoid_when: You prefer OpenAI DALL-E or other image generation platforms. Also: community tool, not official Google integration. Gemini image generation quality and API evolve rapidly.

auth.notes: Google Gemini API key required. Get from Google AI Studio or Google Cloud.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Google AI Studio free tier includes limited Gemini API calls
pricing.paid_tiers: Google Cloud AI pricing per image generated
pricing.notes: Gemini API has free tier via AI Studio. Production use via Google Cloud with billing. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Google Gemini API rate limits — free tier is restrictive

known_agent_gotchas: Gemini image generation API changes rapidly — community MCP may lag behind Google API updates
Free tier rate limits are tight — plan for quota increases before production use
Generated images processed by Google — review data policies for sensitive content
Image generation prompts are logged by Google — avoid PII in prompts
agent_readiness.security_notes: Google API key required. HTTPS to Google AI infrastructure. Prompts and generated images processed by Google. Review Google AI policies for your use case.

security_score_components.security_notes: Google infrastructure. HTTPS. API key. Google processes prompts and images. SOC2/ISO27001.
